findings.name: Calculadora-BMC (Panelin v3.1.5)
findings.readme_head: Calculadora BMC — Panelin v3.1.5. Cotizador profesional de paneles de aislamiento térmico y acústico para BMC Uruguay (METALOG SAS). License: UNLICENSED.
findings.status: LIVE PRODUCTION (Vercel frontend + Cloud Run API panelin-calc) — read-only handling enforced this run

notable_modules.evidence: src/utils/calculations.js (pure engine, techo/pared), src/data/constants.js (422-SKU catalogue, venta/web price lists), calcTotalesSinIVA()
notable_modules.note: hecho confirmado: pure, data-driven, fully unit-tested (tests/validation.js)

notable_modules.evidence: src/pdf-templates/ (7 layouts + buildQuotationModel() dispatcher), src/utils/pdfGenerator.js, server/routes/pdf.js (server-side Chromium, html2pdf.js fallback)
server/lib/agentCore.js (Anthropic+OpenAI provider chain), agentTools.js (tool_use + calc loopback), server/routes/agentChat.js (SSE), autoLearnExtractor.js, trainingKB.js
server/lib/rag.js + embeddings.js (provider-agnostic, pgvector cosine), kb-package/migrations, kbSurface.js, kbAnalytics.js
server/lib/marketIntel/ (scraper, deduplication, delta, alerts, scheduler), server/routes/mlEtlRun.js, scripts/seed-full-competitors.mjs (competitor seeds incl. Canelones locations)
wa-package/migrations, server/routes/wa.js, npm run wa:migrate, /hub/wa route
notable_modules.note: WhatsApp Cloud API team cockpit, Postgres-backed

notable_modules.evidence: transportista-cursor-package/ (AGENTS.md, migrations, prompts, src), server/routes/transportista.js, /logistica /conductor /inspector routes
server/routes/omni.js, aiWorker job queue, automation rules, omni_deals — issues #409 (WAVE 3 hardening) and #420 (model/pricing registry, USD 50/day budget)
notable_modules.note: inferencia: omnichannel AI CRM layer in active build-out, flag-gated

notable_modules.evidence: .claude/agents/bmc-panelin-mcp definition: 22 tools (calc, catalog, state, PDF, CRM, WhatsApp, telemetry) over MCP for external clients
server/lib/identityAuth.js (JWT), authGoogle.js, authMfa.js + mfaTotp.js (TOTP 2FA), requireGrant.js (module-scoped grants)
calculo-especialist agent domain: buildPanelLayout, roofPlanGeometry, PanelChainDimensions, ISO 129 dimensioning, plano-BOM verification badge
server/routes/mlSearch.js, mlEtlRun.js, OAuth token in gs://bmc-ml-tokens (issue #419)

findings.name: shop-chat-agent
findings.readme_head: Build an AI Agent for Your Storefront — Shopify template app embedding an AI chat widget on a storefront; speaks MCP to Shopify APIs (product search, cart, checkout, orders).
findings.status: inferencia: customization of Shopify's OPEN template (shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/storefront-mcp) — the base is freely available, limiting standalone monetization

notable_modules.evidence: shop-chat-agent/app/mcp-client.js — initializes all Shopify Storefront MCP tools
